title: Utility: Rearrange pipette tips for 24-well spacing
author: Tim Fallon
description: Rearranges pipette tips from their standard spacing in a full box, to two empty tip box putting the pipette tips in every other row. This allows the P300/P20-multipipette to be used for pipetting from 24 well plates.
steps_raw: Rearranges pipette tips from their standard spacing in a full box, to two empty tip box putting the pipette tips in every other row. This allows the P300/P20-multipipette to be used for pipetting from 24 well plates.
Place full P300 tip rack in slot 10
Place two empty P300 tip racks in slot 4 and 5
